overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a brown leather coat and cowboy hat walking through a misty mountainous landscape. The character descends a trail alongside a rocky cliff, crosses a shallow river, and continues along the riverbank toward a distant rock formation.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the mountain trail alongside a rocky cliff face, heading toward the misty valley below

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback visible in the distance near the riverbank

entered.detail: tall textured rock wall with layered sedimentary formations running alongside the trail
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
misty valley visible through the trees ahead with hazy atmospheric perspective
narrow dirt path with scattered rocks and patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow mountain trail hugging a rocky cliff face on the left, with pine trees lining the right side. The path descends gradually toward a misty valley visible in the distance. A horse rider can be seen far ahead near the riverbank.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested approach to river with muddy terrain

events.description: trail opens up from narrow cliffside path to wider forested area approaching the river
character navigates carefully down steeper muddy slope toward the riverbank

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the slope toward the river, navigating around rocks and dense vegetation

entered.detail: large deciduous tree with spreading branches at the river's edge
wide flowing river with murky green-brown water becoming visible through the trees
large rocks scattered along the path and slope

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a denser forested area as the character descends toward the river. Large boulders and thick vegetation line the path. The river becomes visible through the trees ahead, with the terrain growing muddier as the character approaches the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky banks

events.description: character steps from muddy riverbank into the shallow flowing water
character wades through deeper section of river, water reaching waist level

agents.ego_description: wading through the river, water splashing around legs, moving steadily toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: murky green-brown water with visible current, ripples, and reflections
natural rock arch formation spanning the distant canyon

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and wades through the flowing water, which reaches waist height in the center. The rocky cliff face recedes into the distance on the left, while a distinctive rock arch bridge becomes visible ahead spanning the canyon. The character splashes through the current and approaches the far bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: gravel riverbank path leading toward canyon arch

events.description: character exits the river onto the rocky riverbank and resumes walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel riverbank path toward the distant rock arch, leaving the river behind

entered.detail: rocky gravel path along the riverbank with patches of grass
boulders and stones scattered along the river edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the character walks along a gravel path on the riverbank. The water flows alongside to the right while the path leads toward the impressive rock arch formation ahead. The terrain opens up into a wide canyon with scattered boulders and grassy banks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character descends from a high mountain trail into a wide, open canyon. It begins along a narrow path hugging a rocky cliff face and pine trees, gradually descending toward a misty valley where a distant rider is visible. As the trail opens into a denser forested area, the camera moves through thick vegetation and over muddy terrain before the character enters the flowing river. The scene then shifts as the character wades through the waist-high current, leaving the cliffs behind while a distinctive rock arch bridge emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character onto a gravel riverbank, where the terrain expands into a wide canyon of scattered boulders and grassy banks leading toward the massive rock formation.
